name: add-your-name@dscc.org
subject: The Hill: "Pence: Legal abortion will end in U.S. 'in our time'"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
At an anti-choice lunch this week, Vice President Mike Pence vowed that the legal right to abortion would end "in our time." Stop the GOP's attempt to drag us backwards >>
---
[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4b1/2b07114c/99c7b92a/731dc003/562091653/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-protect-choice?source=PT-20180304-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
_**The Hill: "Pence: Abortion will end in U.S. 'in our time'"**_
[**Sign now: Condemn Pence 's comments and defend the right to choose >>**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4b1/2b07114c/99c7b92a/731dc003/562091653/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-protect-choice?source=PT-20180304-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
Team --

At an anti-choice lunch this week, Vice President Mike Pence vowed that the legal right to abortion would end "in our time."

We can't allow Pence and his fellow Republicans to drag us backward to a time of back-alley abortions that put women's health and safety at risk.

Senate Democrats are fighting back to protect every woman's right to make her own health care choices, no matter what Pence says next, and we need to have their backs.

[**Add your name to stand with our Democratic Senators and oppose Mike Pence 's dangerous attack on a woman's right to choose >>**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4b1/2b07114c/99c7b92a/731dc003/562091653/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-protect-choice?source=PT-20180304-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

This is just the latest in a long list of GOP attacks on women's health this year.

Republicans cut funding for Planned Parenthood, allowed employers to deny insurance coverage for birth control, _and_ appointed judges who are committed to overturning _Roe v. Wade_.

But Senate Democrats aren't letting their war on women go unanswered -- and now, we have to respond to Pence's comments with a strong show of forceful opposition from grassroots Democrats everywhere.

[**Sign now to show you 're standing alongside Senate Democrats in the fight to protect women's health and rights.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4b1/2b07114c/99c7b92a/731dc003/562091653/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-protect-choice?source=PT-20180304-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**A note on contributions, team:**

Senate Democrats are committed to standing up for women's rights -- including the ELEVEN Democratic Senate women facing re-election this year. Your gift to the Women's Senate Network helps us re-elect every single one of our Senate women champions to ensure they can keep fighting for us.

[**Contribute**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20180304-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4b1/2b07114c/99c7b92a/731dc07d/562091653/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4b1/2b07114c/99c7b92a/731dc07c/562091653/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4b1/2b07114c/99c7b92a/731dc07f/562091653/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: The White House
subject: Prime Minister Netanyahu visits
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3919153e822e1b9edc12cdec328bc99fe079efd844b53573b205a11d9b942f794e4ed822dc42e68fdc1619d5bb32332a6b9eaf3eab5abbb2

Prime Minister Netanyahu visits

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will host Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Mrs. Netanyahu in Washington today. The Prime Minister will join the President both for a private meeting and for a working lunch this afternoon.

The meeting comes as both the United States and Israel look to bring peace and stability to a Middle East that’s been ravaged by violence for far too long. Specifically, the two leaders will discuss President Trump’s recently announced plans to move the U.S. Embassy in Israel to its capital city of Jerusalem.

“Jerusalem is not just the heart of three great religions, but it is now also the heart of one of the most successful democracies in the world,” President Trump said in December. “This sacred city should call forth the best in humanity, lifting our sights to what it is possible.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3919153e822e1b9e290591559e1c474d477133279de7b11053632e3e1c50c0a79e8d5b2305616efc8451559f4db3875a4c6e905a6fbf51f8
See what Israeli and U.S. officials said about President Trump’s historic decision to recognize Jerusalem as Israel’s capital.

America’s manufacturing comeback

“After just one year, under President Trump’s leadership, manufacturing in America is back,” Vice President Mike Pence told an audience at the Westin Book Cadillac Detroit Hotel in Michigan on Friday.

Speaking just blocks from the headquarters of some of America’s biggest car manufacturers, the Vice President explained what so many citizens in Michigan—and indeed, all over the Midwest—saw in President Trump when they supported him in 2016. “American companies have created nearly 200,000 new, good-paying manufacturing jobs, including nearly 6,000 new jobs across Michigan alone,” Vice President Pence said.

The Vice President used the Motor City itself as an example of America’s comeback. “You might have heard Fiat Chrysler is giving out $2,000-tax-cuts bonuses to all of its workers,” he said. “And they’re going to move their entire production line from Mexico to Michigan.”

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3919153e822e1b9eec1c5eed50b1c0bf529088a7ae5e62934c4ac0185b1fd1ddd2b38b4cb910b55c702e87cf3befb96a3bfe71ccc910756d
“At this White House, that’s just what [the President] calls a good start.”

National Consumer Protection Week

On March 2, President Trump proclaimed this week as National Consumer Protection Week—an important occasion to help consumers learn more about their rights in the U.S. marketplace.

A few messages that President Trump wants all Americans to hear this week:

- “American consumers must be alert for a broad range of scams and schemes, including identity theft, cybersecurity breaches, and charity fraud, all of which . . . erode financial security.”
- “Depraved scammers often target the elderly. Such fraud can rob victims of their dignity and confidence, in addition to their resources.”
- “The best weapon against fraud and extortion is a well-informed consumer.”

“A vibrant economy, fueled by consumer confidence, is at the heart of American prosperity,” President Trump writes. “Fraudulent and deceptive practices erode the marketplace.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3919153e822e1b9e1cc54f577003b95bc054ddaab9ea72b9afa5925c8f3342baefbdc76d48a781859d5381690759e5729971ea52ec3c89ad
Learn more about National Consumer Protection Week in the President’s Proclamation.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump honors the late Reverend Billy Graham | March 2, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump and the First Lady welcome Prime Minister Netanyahu and Mrs. Netanyahu to the White House. The four will meet at the South Portico before the President participates in a working lunch with Vice President Pence and Prime Minister Netanyahu. This afternoon, the President will meet with U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley.

The Vice President will participate in a meeting with Israeli Parliamentary Opposition Leader Yitzhak Herzog and later meet with Mayor Nir Barkat of Jerusalem. This evening, the Vice President will deliver remarks at the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) Policy Conference.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3919153e822e1b9e557e799170751a020ee55f5f96a0ace1128ac5ea99a28b01912ee11247c51dff9d81d2a27b6ff1cd26174975502963d4
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3919153e822e1b9e4fd1b0fda82db4a40a7e27905332d0e4582815bc2392cd3dc770756e59a6f1629f34d33271d34524a1ba8f5203514577
Contact the White House |

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd1/2a380d31/48550d2/f1e848/3733957898/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd1/2a380d31/48550d2/f1e848/3733957898/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Did you see our note yesterday, everyone?
**Mike Pence is bragging about Trump 's huge strides toward undoing _Roe v. Wade_ , and House Republicans passed a dangerous 20-week abortion ban at the end of last year.**
Senator Hassan is doing everything she can to protect access to quality, affordable reproductive health care, but she needs to know that you're with her. [**Please sign our petition calling on extreme Republicans to stop attacking women 's health.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd1/2a380d31/48550d2/f1e849/3733957898/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180303_ProtectReproductiveRights?source=e20180305_ProtectRRkick_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie
_\--------------------Original Message--------------------_
Team --
Just a few days ago, Vice President Mike Pence stood in front of a room of anti-abortion activists and touted the "great progress" the Trump administration has made toward rolling back access to reproductive health care.
He didn't stop there -- he claimed that the clock is rolling so far back on women's rights that **we could go back to the days before _Roe v. Wade_ and once again ban legal abortion "in our time."**
We need to fight against these attacks with everything we've got.**[Please sign our petition and tell Mike Pence and ultraconservative Republicans that denying women the right to make their own health care decisions isn't just wrong, it puts women's lives and safety on the line.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd1/2a380d31/48550d2/f1e849/3733957898/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180303_ProtectReproductiveRights?source=e20180305_ProtectRRkick_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
The scary thing is that if we're not careful, there could be some truth to what Pence said. Toward the end of last year, House Republicans passed a ban on abortion after 20 weeks.
As long as these attacks on women's reproductive health care continue, we cannot have an equal society. So, as long as these attacks continue, we've got to do everything we can to fight back.
**One of the best ways to do that is to add your name to this petition calling on Republicans to stop undermining a woman 's right to choose. [Click here to sign.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd1/2a380d31/48550d2/f1e849/3733957898/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180303_ProtectReproductiveRights?source=e20180305_ProtectRRkick_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Thank you for speaking out,
Team Maggie

Just last week the Cook Political Report switched Pennsylvania's 18th from "leans Republican" to "toss-up" -- that's a big deal. It means a Democrat has a chance of winning a district that Trump won by _20 points_ and Republicans have controlled for nearly _two decades._

name: R. Jai Gillum
subject: Everything we can
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316b/9e00690/42c23f47/2403adc1/3865176671/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Hello,

No one ever sends their child to school or their loved one to work thinking it'll be the last time they see them alive -- but that has been the reality for far too many people, including 17 Parkland families just a few weeks ago.

According to a _Washington Post_ analysis, more than 150,000 students from at least 170 schools in the United States have experienced a shooting on their campus over the last 19 years. One child is one too many, but 150,000+ is unimaginable.

This is a public health epidemic. And our elected officials need to be doing everything they can to protect our schools -- but they're not. In 1996, Congress passed the Dickey Amendment which banned the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention from conducting public health research on gun violence.

**[If we're going to end this deadly epidemic, we need Congress to utilize every tool they have to find a solution -- so add your name now and stand with Andrew and myself in demanding Congress repeal the Dickey amendment.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316b/9e00690/42c23f47/2403adc0/3865176671/VEsE/ "http://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/repeal-dickey?source=gillum&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-gillum-ab")**

Andrew has stood up to -- and won -- against the NRA and gun lobby twice. I'm proud that my husband is speaking out and taking proactive steps to keep not only our children, but every child, safe from senseless gun violence.

It's time to take the fight to all levels of our government -- and if we're going to end this epidemic, it will require the same type of scientific research that helped our country save half a million lives from road traffic crashes without banning cars.

**[Gun violence is preventable, and we have lost too many lives at its hands. So add your name now and demand Congress repeal the Dickey amendment.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316b/9e00690/42c23f47/2403adc0/3865176671/VEsF/ "http://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/repeal-dickey?source=gillum&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-gillum-ab")**

Thank you,

R. Jai Gillum

name: Ben Jealous
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME]: Stand up against racial profiling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
When I was a young man, it was Rodney King. When I was a young professional, it was Amadou Diallo. Now I'm raising my son and daughter, and it's Freddie Gray, Trayvon Martin, Michael Brown, and so many other cases in which police misconduct and racial profiling lead to the death or injury of an unarmed civilian.
This gross misconduct has led to Baltimore City and other jurisdictions having to pay millions in settlements or jury awards. It has also led to a deep divide and mistrust between law enforcement and the communities they serve.
**The sad fact is that this problem will not get better by itself.**
Improving public safety begins with restoring the bonds of trust between law enforcement and the communities most impacted by violent crimes. That's why I just released a comprehensive plan that will support reform efforts already underway within Baltimore Police Department, while also instituting new policies statewide that more aggressively address police misconduct and prevent the killing of unarmed civilians.1
**[We know that we are safer when law enforcement focuses not on what we look like, but rather, what we're doing. Your color isn't criminal -- your behavior is. Stand up against racial profiling and the killings of unarmed civilians today, add your name to support my plan.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a748/7ab0e2c4/7f5d0292/349a0ab1/1878388049/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/stand-up-racial-profiling?source=OHQ03058D")**
It's important to keep in mind that police officers do very difficult jobs with very little recognition, and the majority of them succeed in helping to keep all of us safer. That said, the issue here is a distinct minority of officers who are prone to use deadly force.
Unfortunately, we have not seen the courage and moral leadership this moment requires from Larry Hogan. Following the Freddie Gray riots, Larry Hogan failed to lead beyond photo ops and didn't do the hard work required to help pull the City together and address the breakdown of trust between community and police, which also exists in jurisdictions outside of Baltimore.
**[All of us deserve to be respected and protected by those sworn to do just that. Marylanders are ready for a change. If you believe this, then add your name here and let's get to work.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a748/7ab0e2c4/7f5d0292/349a0ab1/1878388049/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/stand-up-racial-profiling?source=OHQ03058D")**
As governor, I'll lead where Larry Hogan has failed by cracking down on police misconduct, equipping officers with better training to reduce instances of unarmed civilian deaths, and ensuring there is accountability when a few bad cops make it more difficult for the good majority of officers to do their jobs. Stand with me today.
Onward,
Ben Jealous

clean_body: Friends, When I was a young man, it was Rodney King. When I was a young professional, it was Amadou Diallo. Now I'm raising my son and daughter, and it's Freddie Gray, Trayvon Martin, Michael Brown, and so many other cases in which police misconduct and racial profiling lead to the death or injury of an unarmed civilian. This gross misconduct has led to Baltimore City and other jurisdictions having to pay millions in settlements or jury awards. It has also led to a deep divide and mistrust between law enforcement and the communities they serve. The sad fact is that this problem will not get better by itself. Improving public safety begins with restoring the bonds of trust between law enforcement and the communities most impacted by violent crimes. That's why I just released a comprehensive plan that will support reform efforts already underway within Baltimore Police Department, while also instituting new policies statewide that more aggressively address police misconduct and prevent the killing of unarmed civilians.1 "" It's important to keep in mind that police officers do very difficult jobs with very little recognition, and the majority of them succeed in helping to keep all of us safer. That said, the issue here is a distinct minority of officers who are prone to use deadly force. Unfortunately, we have not seen the courage and moral leadership this moment requires from Larry Hogan. Following the Freddie Gray riots, Larry Hogan failed to lead beyond photo ops and didn't do the hard work required to help pull the City together and address the breakdown of trust between community and police, which also exists in jurisdictions outside of Baltimore. "" As governor, I'll lead where Larry Hogan has failed by cracking down on police misconduct, equipping officers with better training to reduce instances of unarmed civilian deaths, and ensuring there is accountability when a few bad cops make it more difficult for the good majority of officers to do their jobs. Stand with me today. Onward, Ben Jealous ** "" "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Jay Inslee
subject: FWD: UPDATE [net neutrality]

body:
Congress must protect net neutrality. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbf/2f5ea88d/736111c7/2cbc96c4/730628231/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/protect-net-neutrality?utm_source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&utm_campaign=net-neutrality-update&utm_medium=ema") Friend, We just scored a major victory for an open internet and protecting net neutrality. Thanks to supporters like you speaking out, I just signed the nation's first legislation protecting net neutrality. The bill passed overwhelmingly in the House and the Senate with strong bipartisan support. Our states are acting. Now, it's time for Congress to do the same. [**Sign on to keep the momentum going. Let's push Congress to follow our lead by using the Congressional Review Act (CRA) to secure net neutrality for the entire country. Add your name here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbf/2f5ea88d/736111c7/2cbc96c4/730628231/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/protect-net-neutrality?utm_source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&utm_campaign=net-neutrality-update&utm_medium=ema") We took action in the state of Washington to stop attacks on our open internet. Now it's up to Congress to do the same. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbf/2f5ea88d/736111c7/2cbc96c4/730628231/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/protect-net-neutrality?utm_source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&utm_campaign=net-neutrality-update&utm_medium=ema")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Friday, Jan 26, 2018
Subject: Why net neutrality matters in Washington state:
Friend,
I believe in a free and open internet. The Trump administration? Not so much.
Here in Washington state, we know how important it is to support our democracy -- and our economy -- by ensuring equal access to the internet. We must protect net neutrality for our people, for our businesses, and for our free speech.
[**With the Trump administration on the attack, sign on now to say you support net neutrality. In this legislative session, we must protect our economy and our freedom of speech from corporate monopolies.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbf/2f5ea88d/736111c7/2cbc96c4/730628231/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/protect-net-neutrality?utm_source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&utm_campaign=net-neutrality-update&utm_medium=ema")
The threat is real. Now that net neutrality regulations have been gutted by Trump, you could be charged more to view your favorite apps or put in an "internet slow lane" if you don't. Corporations could block online content that they don't like. 200,000 jobs in Washington are supported by an open internet -- it's key to our innovative economy.
Yet again, with DC failing our communities, we're stepping up in Washington state. The FCC is rolling back regulations at the federal level, so Washington state was the first in the nation to promise action on net neutrality. Here's the plan:
* We'll hold companies to their commitments to not block websites, throttle speeds, or impose prioritization pricing.
* We'll strengthen consumer protections to hold internet service providers (ISPs) accountable for warranties made to consumers.
* As a large purchaser of telecommunications services, we'll ensure all state vendors promote net neutrality.

**In the state of Washington, we won't accept attacks on our open internet. We cannot allow the FCC to obstruct innovation in our digital economy.**
[**Sign on now if you stand with us: We'll do all we can to protect net neutrality.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbf/2f5ea88d/736111c7/2cbc96c4/730628231/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/protect-net-neutrality?utm_source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&utm_campaign=net-neutrality-update&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbf/2f5ea88d/736111c7/2cbc96c4/730628231/VEsA/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/protect-net-neutrality?utm_source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&source=ema_2018-03-05_net-neutrality-update&utm_campaign=net-neutrality-update&utm_medium=ema")
